name: gsb-ai-data-driven-case07-column-update-job-poc
description: Case 07: Schema evolution handling - S3 CSV source with COALESCE for missing columns to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 CSV Source - case07_column_update","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case07_column_update/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"pipe","WithHeader":true}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(AS_OF_DATE), ''), 'yyyyMMdd') AS AS_OF_DATE, NULLIF(TRIM(CID), '') AS CID, NULLIF(TRIM(CTRCT), '') AS CTRCT, NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(COLL, '')), '') AS COLL, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(CTRCT_PLDGAMT AS STRING), '')), '') AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS CTRCT_PLDGAMT, NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(COLTYP, '')), '') AS COLTYP, NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(COLTYP_NAME, '')), '') AS COLTYP_NAME, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(COL_PLDGAMT AS STRING), '')), '') AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS COL_PLDGAMT, NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(CTRSTAT, '')), '') AS CTRSTAT, NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(CTRSTAT_NAME, '')), '') AS CTRSTAT_NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(CTRCOL_STAT, '')), '') AS CTRCOL_STAT, NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(CTRCOL_STAT_NAME, '')), '') AS CTRCOL_STAT_NAME, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(CAST(TOTAL_COL AS STRING), '')), '') AS DECIMAL(18,4)) AS TOTAL_COL, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(CONTRACT_DATE, '')), ''), 'yyyyMMdd') AS CONTRACT_DATE, NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(COLL_NAME, '')), '') AS COLL_NAME, NULLIF(TRIM(COALESCE(COLL_ADDRESS, '')), '') AS COLL_ADDRESS, CURRENT_DATE() AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case07_column_update","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case07_column_update/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
